title: Clean shared package build artifacts from source directory
description:
The @organize/shared package has compiled .js, .d.ts, and .js.map files committed alongside .ts sources in src/. Fix this:
1. Update tsconfig.json to output to dist/ (verify current config)
2. Add src/**/*.js, src/**/*.d.ts, src/**/*.js.map to .gitignore
3. Remove the committed build artifacts from git tracking
4. Verify build still works: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared
5. Verify api and web packages still import correctly from shared

Acceptance criteria:
- No build artifacts in src/ directory
- Build outputs to dist/ only
- All packages compile and import correctly

Dev Lead.notes: Build artifacts removed from tracking. tsconfig already correct. Clean.

QA Lead.notes: QA retest: .gitignore patterns added for src/**/*.js, src/**/*.d.ts, src/**/*.js.map. Files confirmed untracked. Build artifacts on disk only from local builds. PASSED.
